ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Nicolai Claudii Fabricii Perescii Senatoris Aquensis Laudatio
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: habita in funebri concione Academicorum a Io. Iacobo Buccardo Parisiensi

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: Richelieu,Armand Jean du Plessis, duc de ,,1585-1642
Richelieu,Armand Jean du Plessis, duc de ,,1585-1642

Essay.EssayTitle: Io. Iacobi Buccardi Epistola ad Franciscum Olearium Regiarum ratiorum Lutetiae magistrum De funebri concione Academicorum romanorum habita in mortem ... Perescij

(Funebria carmina Academicorum romanorum, in altera editione romana prope-diem foras dabuntur) In orationem funebrem nobilis et docti viri Iacobi Buccardi habitam Romae in morte viri Illustrissimi Nicolai Claudij Fabricij Perescij Carmina (Dormalia, Pollini, Donii, de Grammont, Adimari)

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
